text:
Created attachment 155567
Proposed patch (since 379636 revision)

Patch to update games/wxlauncher port from 0.9.5 to 0.9.6 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/wxLauncher/wxlauncher/compare/release-0.9.5...release-0.9.6

- Remove sed patches, which fixed by upstream
- Enable WX3 option by default
